nasb.text: It happened in the middle of the night that the man was startled and bent forward; and behold, a woman was lying at his feet.

esv.text: At midnight the man was startled and turned over, and behold, a woman lay at his feet!

cnv.text: 到了夜半，波阿斯驚醒過來，一翻身就看到一個女子躺在他的腳邊，

ccb.text: 到了半夜，波阿斯忽然惊醒，翻过身来，发现一个女子躺在他的脚旁，

csbs.text: 到了半夜，那人惊醒，翻过身来，看哪，有一个女子躺在他的脚边！
